accepted.reason: Bilateral Gauss-Seidel update loops and weight construction provide strong numeric optimization workloads.
Pairwise overlap and interval scoring is a compact, deterministic loop kernel.
Minimum-image vector arithmetic and distance kernels are reusable simulation primitives.
Prefix-maximum and threshold-array construction loops are clean standalone kernels.

skipped.reason: NLP text normalization pipeline with heavy external dependencies (nltk/trie/regex stack).
Domain-specific scaffolding objective code with broader project coupling.
Prime-sieve kernel style already well represented in current unpaired set.
Quantum chemistry wrapper with heavy C-layer object integration and pointer ownership.
Memoryview sum example duplicates existing converted content from prior batches.
Encoding wrapper classes tightly coupled to external Draco C++ bindings and APIs.
